goal.name: jar
goal.description: Bundles the main project sources into a JAR archive and forks the build lifecycle to ensure sources are generated before packaging.

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Directory where the generated sources JAR is written. Default: ${project.build.directory}

parameter.name: finalName
parameter.description: Base name of the output artifact (the classifier and "-sources" are appended). Default: ${project.build.finalName}

parameter.name: classifier
parameter.description: Classifier for the sources JAR artifact. User property: maven.source.classifier. Default: sources

parameter.name: includes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which source files to include in the sources JAR.

parameter.name: excludes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which source files to exclude from the sources JAR.

parameter.name: excludeResources
parameter.description: Exclude resource directories (src/main/resources) from the sources JAR, bundling only Java source files. User property: maven.source.excludeResources. Default: false

parameter.name: includePom
parameter.description: Include the project POM file in the sources JAR. User property: maven.source.includePom. Default: false

parameter.name: useDefaultExcludes
parameter.description: Apply default SCM metadata excludes (.git, .svn, CVS, etc.) to the sources JAR. User property: maven.source.useDefaultExcludes. Default: true

parameter.name: archive
parameter.description: Maven Archiver configuration: manifest entries, compression, and other archive metadata.

parameter.name: attach
parameter.description: Whether to attach the generated sources JAR as a project artifact. User property: maven.source.attach. Default: true

parameter.name: outputTimestamp
parameter.description: Timestamp for reproducible archive entries (ISO 8601 date-time or seconds since epoch). User property: project.build.outputTimestamp. Default: ${project.build.outputTimestamp}

parameter.name: forceCreation
parameter.description: Force sources JAR recreation even when the contents have not changed. User property: maven.source.forceCreation. Default: false

parameter.name: skipSource
parameter.description: Skip execution of source JAR goals entirely. User property: maven.source.skip. Default: false

goal.name: jar-no-fork
goal.description: Bundles the main project sources into a JAR archive without forking the build lifecycle. Suitable when sources are guaranteed to have been generated already.

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Directory where the generated sources JAR is written. Default: ${project.build.directory}

parameter.name: finalName
parameter.description: Base name of the output artifact. Default: ${project.build.finalName}

parameter.name: classifier
parameter.description: Classifier for the sources JAR artifact. User property: maven.source.classifier. Default: sources

parameter.name: includes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which source files to include.

parameter.name: excludes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which source files to exclude.

parameter.name: excludeResources
parameter.description: Exclude resource directories from the sources JAR. User property: maven.source.excludeResources. Default: false

parameter.name: includePom
parameter.description: Include the project POM file in the sources JAR. User property: maven.source.includePom. Default: false

parameter.name: useDefaultExcludes
parameter.description: Apply default SCM metadata excludes. User property: maven.source.useDefaultExcludes. Default: true

parameter.name: archive
parameter.description: Maven Archiver configuration: manifest entries, compression, and other archive metadata.

parameter.name: attach
parameter.description: Whether to attach the generated sources JAR. User property: maven.source.attach. Default: true

parameter.name: outputTimestamp
parameter.description: Timestamp for reproducible archive entries (ISO 8601 date-time or seconds since epoch). User property: project.build.outputTimestamp. Default: ${project.build.outputTimestamp}

parameter.name: forceCreation
parameter.description: Force sources JAR recreation even when unchanged. User property: maven.source.forceCreation. Default: false

parameter.name: skipSource
parameter.description: Skip execution of source JAR goals entirely. User property: maven.source.skip. Default: false

goal.name: test-jar
goal.description: Bundles the project test sources into a JAR archive and forks the build lifecycle.

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Directory where the generated test-sources JAR is written. Default: ${project.build.directory}

parameter.name: finalName
parameter.description: Base name of the output artifact. Default: ${project.build.finalName}

parameter.name: classifier
parameter.description: Classifier for the test-sources JAR artifact. User property: maven.source.test.classifier. Default: test-sources

parameter.name: includes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which test source files to include.

parameter.name: excludes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which test source files to exclude.

parameter.name: excludeResources
parameter.description: Exclude test resource directories from the test-sources JAR. User property: maven.source.excludeResources. Default: false

parameter.name: includePom
parameter.description: Include the project POM file in the test-sources JAR. User property: maven.source.includePom. Default: false

parameter.name: useDefaultExcludes
parameter.description: Apply default SCM metadata excludes. User property: maven.source.useDefaultExcludes. Default: true

parameter.name: archive
parameter.description: Maven Archiver configuration: manifest entries, compression, and other archive metadata.

parameter.name: attach
parameter.description: Whether to attach the generated test-sources JAR. User property: maven.source.attach. Default: true

parameter.name: outputTimestamp
parameter.description: Timestamp for reproducible archive entries (ISO 8601 date-time or seconds since epoch). User property: project.build.outputTimestamp. Default: ${project.build.outputTimestamp}

parameter.name: forceCreation
parameter.description: Force test-sources JAR recreation even when unchanged. User property: maven.source.forceCreation. Default: false

parameter.name: skipSource
parameter.description: Skip execution of source JAR goals entirely. User property: maven.source.skip. Default: false

goal.name: test-jar-no-fork
goal.description: Bundles the project test sources into a JAR archive without forking the lifecycle.

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Directory where the generated test-sources JAR is written. Default: ${project.build.directory}

parameter.name: finalName
parameter.description: Base name of the output artifact. Default: ${project.build.finalName}

parameter.name: classifier
parameter.description: Classifier for the test-sources JAR artifact. User property: maven.source.test.classifier. Default: test-sources

parameter.name: includes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which test source files to include.

parameter.name: excludes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which test source files to exclude.

parameter.name: excludeResources
parameter.description: Exclude test resource directories from the test-sources JAR. User property: maven.source.excludeResources. Default: false

parameter.name: includePom
parameter.description: Include the project POM file in the test-sources JAR. User property: maven.source.includePom. Default: false

parameter.name: useDefaultExcludes
parameter.description: Apply default SCM metadata excludes. User property: maven.source.useDefaultExcludes. Default: true

parameter.name: archive
parameter.description: Maven Archiver configuration: manifest entries, compression, and other archive metadata.

parameter.name: attach
parameter.description: Whether to attach the generated test-sources JAR. User property: maven.source.attach. Default: true

parameter.name: outputTimestamp
parameter.description: Timestamp for reproducible archive entries (ISO 8601 date-time or seconds since epoch). User property: project.build.outputTimestamp. Default: ${project.build.outputTimestamp}

parameter.name: forceCreation
parameter.description: Force test-sources JAR recreation even when unchanged. User property: maven.source.forceCreation. Default: false

parameter.name: skipSource
parameter.description: Skip execution of source JAR goals entirely. User property: maven.source.skip. Default: false

goal.name: aggregate
goal.description: Aggregates sources from all modules in a multi-module build into a single sources JAR.

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Directory where the aggregated sources JAR is written. Default: ${project.build.directory}

parameter.name: finalName
parameter.description: Base name of the aggregated output artifact. Default: ${project.build.finalName}

parameter.name: classifier
parameter.description: Classifier for the aggregated sources JAR. User property: maven.source.classifier. Default: sources

parameter.name: includes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which source files to include.

parameter.name: excludes
parameter.description: Ant-style fileset patterns selecting which source files to exclude.

parameter.name: excludeResources
parameter.description: Exclude resource directories from the aggregated sources JAR. User property: maven.source.excludeResources. Default: false

parameter.name: includePom
parameter.description: Include POM files in the aggregated sources JAR. User property: maven.source.includePom. Default: false

parameter.name: archive
parameter.description: Maven Archiver configuration: manifest entries, compression, and other archive metadata.

parameter.name: attach
parameter.description: Whether to attach the aggregated sources JAR to the project. User property: maven.source.attach. Default: true

parameter.name: outputTimestamp
parameter.description: Timestamp for reproducible archive entries (ISO 8601 date-time or seconds since epoch). User property: project.build.outputTimestamp. Default: ${project.build.outputTimestamp}

parameter.name: skipSource
parameter.description: Skip execution of source JAR goals entirely. User property: maven.source.skip. Default: false

goal.name: help
goal.description: Displays help information on available goals and parameters.

parameter.name: detail
parameter.description: Show parameter details for the specified goal. Default: false

parameter.name: goal
parameter.description: Name of the goal for which to show detailed help.

parameter.name: lineLength
parameter.description: Maximum line length for help output. Default: 80

parameter.name: indentSize
parameter.description: Number of spaces per indentation level in help output. Default: 2
